headline: Does United Parcel Service (UPS) Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether United Parcel Service stock offers fair value at around US$99.89 per share, the key is to separate short term share price noise from what the business might be worth. Over the past week the stock is down 6.3%, while the 1 year return sits at 13.6%, which contrasts with a 3 year return of 31.8% and a 5 year return of 41.3%. Recent coverage has focused on how United Parcel Service is positioned in global parcel delivery and logistics, with attention on its role in...

headline: Local Business Owner Opens New Family-Owned PostalAnnex Location in San Diego, California
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., one of the leading franchisors in the packing, shipping and office services industries, is proud to announce the opening of its newest PostalAnnex location in San Diego, CA to new owners, Nadir and Danny Khairo. This new PostalAnnex is family-owned and is set to offer a wide range of essential shipping, mailbox rental and office services to the local community.
